title: Live results: Cooper, Whatley favorites in North Carolina Senate primaries
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Former North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper (D) and former Republican National Committee Chair Michael Whatley are both vying for their parties’ nomination in the Tar Heel State’s Senate primaries. Cook Political Report rates the November general election as a “toss up,” given Cooper’s popularity across the state. Both Cooper and Whatley are expected to win…
